to.description:
The recipient address for the test message.
- For SMS: Phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +15551234567)
- For Email: Email address (e.g., user@example.com)

message.description: Custom test message content (optional). If not provided, a default test message will be sent.
message.example: This is a test message from TagoIO

subject.description: Email subject line (only for email service type, optional)

value.message: This is a test SMS from TagoIO

value.subject: Test Email from TagoIO
value.message: This is a test email from TagoIO to verify your email service configuration.
